title: Async Task Queue
description: Implement an async task queue with configurable concurrency that processes promises in order while limiting parallel execution.

complexity.time: O(n) total, O(c) parallel where c = concurrency

requirements: Implement add(asyncFn) method that returns a Promise
Implement clear() to cancel pending tasks
Handle task errors without stopping the queue

few_shot_examples.prompt: Implement a simple promise queue that runs one at a time.
Run N promises concurrently with Promise.all.
